titleStmt.title: SII 18.124: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 124. (B.K. No. 89 of 1933-34.) HONNATTI, RĀṆEBENNŪR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up behind the temple of Rāmaliṅga.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 48, Śōbhakṛit, Māgha Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Saṁkrānti, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1124, February 17, Sunday. There was however no solar eclipse nor did any saṁkrānti occur on that day.

It records a grant of land made to the temple of Chāmēs11vara constructed by Dēkaṇṇa and Nākaṇṇa the pradhānas of Jōma, brother of Mallideva of the Gutta family. The gift was handed over to Brahmarāśijīya, the āchārya of the temple. It is stated that Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Siṁhaṇadēva was governing the Sēguṇa country, Paḷiyaṇḍa Four-thousand, the āgrahāra Honnavartti and other agrahāras. His minister Ullaharāja is mentioned. It is also stated that Jōma was holding the manneya of Ponnavartti Twelve, Beḷuhuge Seventy and Beṇṇevūr Twelve with his capital at Guttavoḷal. The agrahāra Ponnavartti and its Mahājanas are highly praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
kālakṣēpō na karttavyaṁ Āyukṣīṇē dinē dinē yamasya karuṇaṁ nāsti dharmmasya tvaritā gataḥ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya rā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . maruḷakkuṁ
tripurīśanalladaḍavaṁ cakripratāpātapaṁ piriduṁ tāpamanuṁṭumāḍe hi
mamaṁ pokkirppudeṁdiṁtu pēḷvara mātaṁ nasugēḷvaḍā himavadēṁ tatpāpamaṁ māṇisal
caraṇadvaṁdvanakhāṁśucaṁdrikeyo pēḷu cāḷukya cakrēśana . tatpādapadmōpajī
vi . samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara siṁhaṇadēvaṁ sēguṇadēśamaṁ paḷiya
ṇḍa nālsāsiramu mattamanēkadēśāgrahāraṁgaḷuṁ banavāsenāḍa baḷiyanādi
yegrahāraṁ honnavarttiymaṁ sukhadināḷuttamire . tadamātyanakhiḷaguṇa
gaṇasadanaṁ saujanyalalitalatikākaṁdaṁ sadamaḷasasiyaśanesedaṁ viditōdya
ttapanatējanullaharāja . Ātaṁ ponnavattiyaṁ svāmiprasādadiṁ sukhamanubhavisutta miralalli
ge . samastabhuvanajanasaṁstūyamānacārucaraṇāraviṁda vairibaḷaviḷayagōviṁda pāṭaḷīpu
ravarādhīśvara kīrttyaṁganādhīśvaranujjēnīmahākāḷadēvalabdhavaraprasādaṁ raṇakēḷī vinōda vaṭakaḷpataru
śōbhitavijayakīrttidhvaja rūpamakaradhvaja caṁdraguptānvayalalāṭalōcana mriga rājalāṁ
chana daśasiṁhāsanapavitra sabeḷatriṇētra bhūcakraṣakranayyana cakra vikramāditya vaṁśōdbhavarappa
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara mallidēvarasa . guttavaṁśalalāmasya caṁḍavairidharātaḷa nīrākara Imō bhāThe
ti vētravidrumasaṁcayaiḥ . rājantē sōvatātvāṁ nijanijavadanāḷaṁkritaśrōtra pratratrāṇāyā
nammadaityādipavaravanitānāṁ caḷatkuṁntaḷaughāḥ yatpādādyainakhāṁśō surasari dudarōn
vṛṁdamaṁbhōjavṛṁdē bhrāṁmyunmattāḷinīnāmiva navaśaśabhṛnmaṇḍanō mallidēva . Arinarapāḷa
raḷugaruḷugaḷa baṁbale bāsigameccu pāyva nettare kosakuṁkumaṁ muṟidu susida palgaḷe sēṣe vaiReadsū
rikiṁkaraśiraḥkarōdhigaḷe soṁnaliyāgire mallidēvanuddurajayakanyakāpariṇayōtsavamaṁ meṟedaṁ
mahājiyoḷ . tadanuja . dorevettaudāryyamuṁ sauryyamuvoḍanoḍanoṁdoṁda noṁdoṁdu mīṟu
ttire gaṁbhīratvamuṁ tatvamumoḍanoḍanoṁdoṁdanoṁdoṁdu mīṟuttire tatvākhyāna muṁ mānamumo
ḍanoḍanoṁdoṁdanoṁdoṁdu mīṟuttire tannaṁ mīṟalāruṁ neṟeyarenisidaṁ dēvanī jōmadēva . varedarggīvu
duvāntaraṁ tanipuduṁ bhītātmaraṁ kāvuduṁ dhare koṇḍāḍuva guttavaṁśajara pūrvā bhyāsaveṁdaṁdaccariye
bēḍidarggīvudu dhuradoḷāṭaṁdāntaraṁ sōvuduṁ śaraṇeṁdirddaḍe kāpuduṁ bhujada balpiṁ jōmabhūpakṣitī
śa . Ene negaḷda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jōmadēvaṁ ponnavartti panneraḍuṁ beḷuhugeyettuṁbeṇṇevū
rpanneraḍintinitakkaṁ manneyādhipatyamaṁ tāḷdi duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ gutta voḷalalu su
khaṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . kuṁtaḷaviṣayavadhūṭīkāṁtisamētānanakke mūginavoḷe celvaṁ taḷedu tōrppudakhi
ḷāsāntāvṛtakīrti ponnavarttigrāma . surapuramaṁ paḷancaledu bhōgavatīpuramaṁ taguḻdudhikkarisi kubērani
kkeya yaḷakāpuramaṁ paḷideyde tanna bittaramane lōkadoḷmeredu raṁjisuvaggada ponnavarttiyaṁ nararaḷavaltu ba
baṇnipaḍiḷātaḷadūrggaḷa cakravarttiya . poṁbesada bēgulagaḷiniṁbāgire sameda viṣṇugraha saṁcayadhiṁ ceṁbasa
diya tiṁtiṇiyinaḷuṁbaṁ palavuṁ vihāradiṁ sogayisuguṁ . paḷabhārānatagandhasāḷi vanadiṁdaṁ prōccaḷa
tu śīkarāvaḷi mēghāvaḷiyoḷu paḷaṁcuva taḍāgānīkadiṁ pēśaḷātuḷa sarvvarttu kanandanāvaḷigaḷiṁ saṁdikṣu
vāṭaṁgaḷiṁdiḷeyoḷ nōrppaḍe ponnavattiya viḷāsaṁ nāḍe kaṇgo ppugu . Alligūrro ḍeya . nere dhare tanna
padābjakkeraguva cāḷukyacakritanna padābjakkeṟaguvanene baṇnisalārnneṟevar śrīvika māṁkadaṇḍādhipana . Alli
ya dharāmarāvaḷiyellaṁ vēdārtthaśāstranītipurāṇādyullasitasakaḷavidyōtphullāṁbuja ṣaṇḍakēḷīlōḷa
marāḷar . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīla saṁpannaru sujana
nasuprasannaru manucaritrādharīkritaviśuddhacaritraru sakaḷavarṇnāśramapavitraru svarggāpavarggamārggaikasādhakaru ha
riharapādāṁbujārādhakaru yajanayājana Adhyayanādhyāpana dāna pratigraha ṣaṭkarmmanirataru vinirmmuktaduri
taru madavadahitakuḷasaṁharaṇaru catussamayasamuddharaṇaru dānaguṇataṭinīprabhūtahima vantar
sāhityavidyālatāvasantaru Ityādyanēkanāmāvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmadanādiya grahāraṁ ponnavarttiyūro
ḍeyapramukha mahājanavinnūrvvaru . guttara vaṁśadoḷu negaḷda jōmanabīḍinoḷa tyudāttaviprōttamanappa
dēkaṇane dalu nayadoḷu guṇadoḷu negartteyoḷu bittarisalke takkapuruṣaṁ puruṣōttamaneṁdu svā
misaṁpattine baṇnipargguṇakaraṇḍakanaṁ manunītimārggana . baṇnigevātaguḷaṁ nuḍivaṇnaṁ gaḷaniralī jōmadēvana sa
bheyoḷu kaṇnirppavolirddaṁ nākaṇnaṁ parivāravārddhivarddhana caṁdra . Antenisi negaḷdu jōmadēvana pradhānarappa dēkaṇnanuṁ
nākaṇnanuṁ māḍisida cāmēśvaradēvara dēgulada khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakka gandha dhūpadīpanivēdyakka vūroḍeyapramu
kha mahājanavinnūrvvaraṁ prasādisikoṇḍu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 48 neya śōbhakritsaṁvatsarada māghadama
vāse Ādityavāra saṁkrānti vyatīpāta sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu cāmēśvaradēvara sthānadācāryyarappa brahmarāsijīya
ra kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa gardde gājavūrada baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍalu hōkabbeya kaḷḷadalli kacchaviyagaḷeya
lu gadde kamma Āyvattu śrīkalidēvara kēśavadēvara keyiṁdommēreyiṁ teṁkalu vareyakeyi matta
gājavūrada koladēreya baḷiyalu bāṇēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ paḍuvaluṁ kisukāḍu matta
roṁdu dēvara parisūtradiṁ mūḍalu hūvinatōṁṭa kamma hattu Ūroḷage mane Oṁdu telligaralli soṁṭṭage
Eṇne Intī dharmmavanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisida vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraprayāge Arghyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavileya kō
ḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ konnalu kaṭṭisi sāsirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggubheyamukhi dānagoṭṭa phalamakku Idanaḷidātanā
tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷanitu kavileymasa nibaru brāhmaṇarumanaḷida pātakamaneyduvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuReadna
ndharā ṣaṣṭhirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhu rdēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamē
kākinaṁ hantu dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sa
rvvānētān bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . śrī śrī śrī ©
śrī cāmanāthadēvaṁge Uḷiya mūnūrvvaru hava koṭṭaru [.]
Digital edition of SII 18.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
